title: DiamondSalvage
description: Salvage your diamond tools and armor for some extra diamonds!
body:
This datapack adds simple crafting recipes to turn diamond tools and armor back into raw diamonds. You can salvage your diamond items by putting them in the crafting table to receive majority of the diamonds you used to make the tool.

Helmet -> 3 diamonds

Chestplate -> 5 diamonds

Leggings -> 4 diamonds

Boots -> 2 diamonds



Sword -> 1 diamond

Pickaxe -> 2 diamonds

Axe -> 2 diamonds

Shovel -> 2 sticks (to prevent infinite recycling of shovels)

Hoe -> 1 diamond
